title: OtisFuse
summary: Phil's YouTube outpost for public videos, experiments, commentary, and the broader world around his projects.
description: OtisFuse is the media city-state attached to Phil's public brand. It matters because it turns projects into artifacts people can discover, watch, and share without already knowing his code or writing.
In the world map, it acts as a harbor city for reach, distribution, and public personality. It should make the portfolio feel like it belongs to a real internet-native builder, not just a resume.

media.alt: A screenshot of the OtisFuse YouTube channel.
media.caption: A public video outpost for distribution, commentary, and creator-facing brand building.

greatWorks.title: Signal Beacon
greatWorks.summary: Public video distribution that turns project work into something shareable and memorable.

highlights: Adds a media layer to Phil's public brand.
Turns projects into shareable artifacts for a broader audience.
Supports the portfolio's goal of making strangers want to follow what comes next.
productionQueue: Publish more project demos and commentary.
Connect videos more tightly to Robot Future posts and project pages.
Use the channel to make complex AI and engineering work easier to discover.
